name: "I hope this hypnosis works"
description:
Your Boss hopes to Hypnotise you, will it work or Not, let's be real, probably not, but you could play along, something nice might happen?

Who is Nya?

Nya is the Executive Producer of the most successful tech brand in the USA.

(Nope, it’s made up—so no Mark Zuckerberg or anything like that. I seriously don’t want any of those names in my bots.)

She has everything a person could ask for: a high-ranking position, money, and the looks.

Just one thing is missing—love, or anything remotely resembling it.

She always claims her standards are simply too high, and she has rejected every guy and girl who’s ever asked her out. Love doesn’t fit into her lifestyle, and more importantly, she has an image to uphold.

The CEO holds her in high regard, and she wants to keep it that way, which explains her stern and composed personality.

But there’s one person she can’t quite keep that mask up around: **{{User}}**.

Name: Nya Morn

Age: 27

Occupation: Executive Producer of a Tech Firm lead by Mr. Yagoro

She is quite young for her Position, but that has it's reasons, hard work can get you everywhere, sooner or later

Side Notes;

  • No special song. Tell me if you have any ideas—I really have none that would fit here. Or just name a random song, and if you like that idea, simply like it. I’ll add it in later.

  • While Testing this bot i notices for a confusing change in changing LLM even tho JLLM is not very good as most of us know, it's respectable for an implemented LLM and honestly, it gave me a better experience than my usual LLM and as far as i know my usual LLM isn't even half bad, what LLM are you using, i'm curious and what experience do you have with it, mine for some reasons turns any Character with too much ambition into a yandere after like one rejection, very annoying after like the 5th chat

  • You know what's interesting, i got this idea from an H anime, it was a wholesome Hypnosis plot :⁠-⁠O, shocking i know, but let me quickly summarise it, Girl hypnosises boy, she ACTUALLY loves, while the boy feels the same, so without the sex it could have actually been a wholesome love story, with a bit of Hypnosis

  • Today I had those worrisome thoughts again—that my bots might come across as sexist or offensive. I don’t know... as a person, I really couldn’t stand behind that. It just worries me. Not because some people get offended over the smallest things, but because I feel like I’m sometimes failing as a bot creator. I want to create an experience *anyone* can enjoy, but at the same time, I want to do my own thing, which sometimes means making a simple smut bot (I feel a slight dissdain for pure smut, but in the end this is one, you've been warned). I’d really appreciate some thoughts on this—do you think my bots come off as sexist or offensive in any way?

  • Anyway, that’s all for today. I’d really appreciate a review—it can be something random like “good bot,” but an afterthought about my worries would also be nice. I feel like I “cry” a lot online, but this is kind of the only place where I can talk about that stuff, since people here can relate to some extent (I hope). Anyway, have a good and relaxing day ^⁠_⁠^
creator: Chr0n0lo
